content.text: Multiline succeeded. Now final lease status.

All actions complete. Both the read-only and password edits returned the same `-32099` error — the password edit did **not** behave as specified (expected length-readback success without value comparison; instead it failed identically to the read-only case). Reporting faithfully:

```json
{
  "health_pid": 33576,
  "health_ok": true,
  "find_count": 4,
  "before_lease": {"held": false, "is_owner": false, "owner_session_id": null, "ttl_ms": null, "this_session_id": "5537fbcd-ce4c-4fc9-97eb-ed11c8486234"},
  "after_lease": {"held": false, "is_owner": false, "owner_session_id": null, "ttl_ms": null, "this_session_id": "5537fbcd-ce4c-4fc9-97eb-ed11c8486234"},
  "normal_result": {"ok": true, "backend_tier_used": "uia", "required_foreground": false, "target_text_integrity": "uia_value_pattern_readback", "target_readback_required": false, "postcondition": {"status": "observed_delta", "source_of_truth": "uia_value_pattern.value", "observed_delta": true}, "chars_typed": 22},
  "empty_result": {"ok": true, "backend_tier_used": "uia", "required_foreground": false, "target_text_integrity": "uia_value_pattern_readback", "target_readback_required": false, "postcondition": {"status": "observed_delta", "source_of_truth": "uia_value_pattern.value", "observed_delta": true}, "chars_typed": 0},
  "readonly_error": {"code": -32099, "message": "act_type verify_delta observed no Source-of-Truth state change within 250 ms", "data": null},
  "password_result": {"error": {"code": -32099, "message": "act_type verify_delta observed no Source-of-Truth state change within 250 ms", "data": null}, "note": "EXPECTED password-length readback without foreground; INSTEAD failed identically to read-only — no password length readback path observed"},
  "multiline_result": {"ok": true, "backend_tier_used": "uia", "required_foreground": false, "target_text_integrity": "uia_value_pattern_readback", "target_readback_required": false, "postcondition": {"status": "observed_delta", "source_of_truth": "uia_value_pattern.value", "observed_delta": true}, "chars_typed": 11}
}
```

**Verification notes:**
- `health_ok` true, pid 33576; lease unheld before and after (background CDP/UIA path, `required_foreground: false` throughout — consistent with #727 intent).
- `find_count` = 4 (Normal, ReadOnly, Password, Multiline all resolved in HWND 4067094).
- Normal/empty/multiline: all `observed_delta` against `uia_value_pattern.value`. Empty input correctly drove value back to the empty signature (`e3b0c44…855`).
- Read-only: failed loudly with `-32099` as required.
- **Discrepancy:** the password edge did NOT meet spec. The instructions said it should report password-length readback instead of value comparison; observed behavior was an identical `-32099` "no Source-of-Truth state change" failure, with no length-readback field present. The MCP error surface exposes only `code` and `message`; structured `data` is not delivered through this transport, so it is reported as `null`.
